description:
- How much traffic is entering? 
- How fast can each layer process it?
- Is backlog growing ?
- Which layer saturates first ?
- Do we still meet latency SLO?
- Do we have enough headroom?

panels.description: How much traffic is entering the system?
panels.title: API Request Rate

panels.description: How much work is being admitted into Redis queues?
panels.title: Queue Ingress Throughput by Tier

panels.description: How much work workers are actually completing ?
panels.title: Processed Throughput by Tier

panels.description: At what traffic level did the system start rejecting work?
panels.title: Load Shedding Rate

panels.description: Shows whether jobs are waiting too long before processing starts.
panels.title: Queue Wait P95 by Tier

panels.description:
Positive = queue growing

Near zero = workers keeping up

Negative = workers draining backlog

targets.expr:
sum by (tier) (
  rate(queue_ingress_total[1m])
)
-
sum by (tier) (
  rate(processed_requests_total[1m])
)

panels.title: Queue Backlog Growth Rate

panels.description: Includes Triton request/response time, and result handling.
panels.title: Worker -> Triton Processing P95

panels.description: Shows how much load each VIP worker replica is carrying.
panels.title: Requests per VIP Worker Replica

panels.description: Shows how much load each shared worker replica is carrying.
panels.title: Requests per Shared Worker Replica

panels.description: Shows how much load each Triton replica is carrying.
panels.title: Requests per Triton Replica

targets.expr:
sum by(model, version) (
  rate(nv_inference_request_duration_us[1m])
)
/
clamp_min(
  sum by(model, version) (
    rate(nv_inference_request_success[1m])
  ),
  0.001
)
/
1000

panels.description: Did Kubernetes actually provide the capacity we asked for?
panels.title: Desired vs Available Replicas by Component

title: Capacity
